plugins.name: Qin_RV
plugins.notes: Installed from local_audio_assets\古风空音Kong Audio 2.2\Qin_RV_Setup_v2.2.exe. Library paths are written by E:\Kong Audio Library\Locate_Library_Here.exe into C:\VSTPlugins\KongAudio\Qin_RV.XML.

styles.name: Kong GaoHu Sus Leg MW
styles.notes: Create this in Carla GUI by loading Qin_RV, selecting ChineeGaoHu, loading preset 05 Sus_Leg_1_MW, confirming sound, then saving the plugin state to this local .carxs path.

styles.name: Surge XT Default
styles.notes: No state file required. Useful as a baseline API render style.
